records.ety: [OF. coveitos, F. convoiteux. See Covet, v. t.]

defs: Very desirous; eager to obtain; -- used in a good sense.
quotes: Covetous of wisdom and fair virtue.
Covetous death bereaved us all, To aggrandize one funeral.

defs: Inordinately desirous; excessively eager to obtain and possess (esp. money); avaricious; -- in a bad sense.
quotes: The covetous person lives as if the world were madealtogether for him, and not he for the world.
